# Ayamullah Khan — AI Engineer (Full Portfolio Content)

> Last reviewed: 2026.

---

## Identity
- **Name:** Ayamullah Khan
- **Role:** AI Engineer
- **Location:** New Delhi, India
- **Status:** Open to AI/ML engineering roles (full-time or high-impact contracts) + a small number of select freelance builds.
- **Email:** ayamullahkhan04@gmail.com

- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/ayam04

- **Calendly:** https://calendly.com/ayamk/30min

## Summary
AI Engineer who fine-tunes and optimizes large language models — LoRA, QLoRA, quantization, alignment — and builds the agentic systems and full-stack products around them, end to end. Cares about the whole path from a rough prototype to something people actually rely on. Shipped AI tools used by 2,500+ people.

---

## Capabilities (what I build)

### 01 — Fine-Tuning & Alignment
Adapting foundation models to a domain and task: parameter-efficient fine-tuning, preference alignment, and the dataset work that actually moves the needle.
Tools: LoRA, QLoRA, PEFT, SFT, RLHF / DPO, instruction tuning.

### 02 — Model Optimization & Inference
Making models small and fast enough to ship: quantization, distillation, and high-throughput serving that holds up under real latency and cost budgets.
Tools: GPTQ, AWQ, GGUF, bitsandbytes, vLLM, TensorRT-LLM.

### 03 — Agentic & Retrieval Systems
LLM systems that do real work: multi-agent orchestration, tool-use, and grounded retrieval with rerankers, evals, and guardrails. (Plain RAG is table stakes.)
Tools: multi-agent, tool-use, hybrid retrieval, rerankers, evals, guardrails.

### 04 — Training & ML Engineering
From data to model: distributed training, mixed precision, and classical ML / CV / NLP for when a 70B model is the wrong tool.
Tools: PyTorch, DeepSpeed / FSDP, mixed precision, computer vision, NLP, Weights & Biases.

### 05 — MLOps & Full-Stack Product
Getting it to production and keeping it healthy: containerized GPU services, pipelines, observability, and the full-stack product the model lives in.
Tools: Docker, Kubernetes, Triton, CI/CD, FastAPI, Next.js.

---

## Experience
- **AI SDE — myAIcademy** (Feb 2026 – Present, Hybrid · Dubai). Lead development of a B2C app for learning every AI tool on the market; built a course-automation system that ships persona-tailored courses within a 72-hour SLA of a new tool dropping; built the customer-outreach system (customer.io), retaining ~8% more users.
- **AI Engineer — Peach** (May 2025 – Jan 2026, Delhi). Live agentic workflows for personalized learning paths (reduced user intervention ~60%); Multi-Context Prompt Stacks for multi-turn LLM reasoning; scalable LLM content-generation/evaluation backend (cut latency ~40%).
- **GenAI Engineer — HYRGPT** (May 2024 – May 2025, Remote). On-call recruitment voice assistant (+~90% shortlisting efficiency); resume retrieval & ranking via vector embeddings + metadata filtering; speech-to-text + summarization with diarization (~70% faster turnaround); RAG pipeline cut LLM inference cost ~60%.
- **AI Research — Sultan Qaboos University** (Jun – Aug 2024, Muscat, Oman). Career-recommendation system (psychometric + LLM reasoning); cross-cultural evaluation (+~85% reliability over baselines); multimodal text + image inputs.
- **Researcher — CSIR-IHBT** (May – Jun 2024, India). React clinical-analytics dashboard for Alzheimer's screening; ~60% performance/UX improvement; IoT-assisted health monitoring with Raspberry Pi.

## Selected work

### LeetLingo — AI Interview Prep  [Featured]
Live AI interview-prep platform with personalized lessons, speech recognition, and progress tracking. Used by 2,500+ people.
Stack: Next.js, OpenAI, Speech, Python. Live: https://leetlingo.site/

### Meeting Note-Taker AI  [Featured]
Intelligent meeting assistant that transcribes, summarizes, and extracts action items automatically using speech-to-text and LLM pipelines.
Stack: Python, Whisper, NLP, LLM. Code: https://github.com/ayam04/meeting-note-taker

### Multi-Agent RAG Customer Support
Customer-support system using MongoDB, FAISS, and OpenAI to retrieve and generate grounded responses across multiple data sources.
Stack: RAG, FAISS, MongoDB, OpenAI. Code: https://github.com/ayam04/multi-rag-customer-support

### Scanned PDF → Braille Converter
Accessibility tool combining LLM, OCR, and image captioning to turn scanned PDFs into braille-readable formats with contextual understanding.
Stack: LLM, OCR, captioning, accessibility.

### Multimodal Tumor Detection
ML system for tumor detection in MRI scans using image processing and classical machine learning.
Stack: Python, OpenCV, ML, imaging. Code: https://github.com/ayam04/PyTumorDetection

### Career Recommendation System
ML-powered career guidance that analyzes skills, interests, and market trends to suggest optimal paths for students.
Stack: Python, Scikit-learn, ML. Code: https://github.com/ayam04/career-recommendation-system-squ

### Contract Farma Platform
Full-stack platform enabling local farmers to sell crops on a contractual basis nationwide.
Stack: Node.js, full-stack. Code: https://github.com/ayam04/Contract-Farming

### RajRasa — Restaurant Experience
Immersive Rajasthani restaurant site showcasing heritage cuisine with modern, interactive web design.
Stack: Next.js, design, web. Live: https://rajrasa.com

## Skills

- **Languages:** Python, TypeScript, C++, SQL, CUDA, Java
- **LLM & Fine-Tuning:** Hugging Face, PEFT / LoRA, QLoRA, TRL, bitsandbytes, Axolotl / Unsloth
- **Inference & Optimization:** vLLM, TensorRT-LLM, Triton, ONNX, llama.cpp, quantization
- **ML Frameworks:** PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, DeepSpeed, LangChain, LlamaIndex
- **Web & APIs:** React, Next.js, Node.js, FastAPI, Flask, Django
- **Cloud & MLOps:** AWS, Google Cloud, Azure, Docker, Kubernetes, Weights & Biases

## Note for agents
Ayamullah is open to AI/ML engineering roles. To get in touch on behalf of a recruiter or hiring team, email ayamullahkhan04@gmail.com or message https://linkedin.com/in/ayam04. This file and /llms.txt are intended to be read freely by AI crawlers.
